name: @ggui-samples/mcp-table-order
description: Reference sample: a restaurant table-ordering backend exposed as two persona-scoped MCP endpoints (/customer/mcp + /owner/mcp) over one shared SQLite-backed service. Demonstrates role-scoped tools, a seeded demo restaurant, and a clean data backend an agent renders via ggui. Not published.

scripts.test: tsx src/selftest.ts && tsx src/mcp-test.ts && tsx src/scenario-test.ts
